articles.title: Cardano Price Forecast – ADA Down 1%, Time to Buy the Dip?
articles.description: Cardano has continued its sideways movement in the last 24hrs, first seeing a near 2% rise before sharp sell-offs saw the coin twice dip to $0.36. ADA is now 1% down in the last 24hrs. The coin found strong support at $0.36, but its Relative Strength Index (RSI) is now just 27 on the 1-day chart – only XRP and XLM have a lower score among the top 100 coins, and it appears to be...

articles.title: BitKeep suffers $1M hack
articles.description: Decentralized multichain wallet BitKeep lost $1 million on October 17 to a hacker who exploited its swap features on the BNB chain.

articles.title: Ripple wants to bring Ethereum smart contracts to the XRP Ledger
articles.description: The EVM-compatible XRP Ledger sidechain is set to undergo its second phase in early 2023, which will make the chain permissionless and improve scalability.

articles.title: US Regulators Step Up Scrutiny of the Crypto Industry. 3AC, FTX Under Investigation
articles.description: US regulators are investigating major players in the crypto industry, like the famous FTX and the infamous Three Arrows Capital.
